Effect version: 4.0.0

/.src/leakingRequirements.ts(8,14): suggestion TS377041: Methods of this Service require 'FileSystem' from every caller. This leaks implementation details — resolve these dependencies at Layer creation time. effect(leakingRequirements)

    export class FileSystem extends ServiceMap.Service<FileSystem, {
      writeFile: (content: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
    }>()("FileSystem") {}
    
    export class LeakingDeps extends ServiceMap.Service<LeakingDeps, {
                 ~~~~~~~~~~~

      readCache: Effect.Effect<void, never, FileSystem>
    }>()("LeakingDeps") {}
    
    export function local() {
      class _LocalClass extends ServiceMap.Service<_LocalClass, {
        writeFile: (content: string) => Effect.Effect<void>
      }>()("LocalClass") {}

            ~~~~~~~~~~~~~
